}

body::before {
    /* Display the pseudo-element on top of the body */
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;

    /* Set the background image with 10% opacity */
    background-image: url('https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0684/2997/1713/files/Frame_1_1.png?v=1706560299');
    background-repeat: repeat;
    background-size: none;
    opacity: 0.1;

    /* Ensure the pseudo-element is below the content of the body */
    z-index: -1;
}

</style>

settings.title: Downpayment
settings.html_area:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Select all product title elements
    var productTitles = document.querySelectorAll('.grid-product__title');

    productTitles.forEach(function(title) {
        // Regular expression to match '*text*'
        var regex = /\*([^*]+)\*/;
        var match = title.textContent.match(regex);

        if (match) {
            // Extract the matched text and remove it from the title
            var matchedText = match[1];
            title.textContent = title.textContent.replace(regex, '').trim();

            // Find the parent link element
            var parentLink = title.closest('a.card-body');

            if (parentLink) {
                // Find the price element within the parent link
                var priceWrap = parentLink.querySelector('.grid-product__price-wrap');

                if (priceWrap) {
                    // Create the custom text element
                    var customText = document.createElement('span');
                    customText.textContent = matchedText;
                    customText.style.fontSize = 'small';
                    customText.style.fontStyle = 'italic';

                    // Insert the custom text below the price
                    priceWrap.appendChild(customText);
                }
            }
        }
    });
});
</script>

settings.title: Slider Animation
settings.html_area:
<script>
window.addEventListener('load', function() {
  // Function to apply or reset styles based on the presence of 'slick-current'
  function updateSlideStyles() {
    // Get all slides
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slick-slide');
    // Loop over slides to apply or reset styles
    slides.forEach(slide => {
      // Exclude slides within the popup-slider
      if (!slide.closest('.popup-slider')) {
        // Check if this slide is the current one
        if (slide.classList.contains('slick-current')) {
          // Reset styles for the current slide
          slide.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
          slide.style.filter = 'none';
        } else {
          // Apply styles for other slides
          slide.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
          slide.style.filter = 'blur(1px)';
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // Function to handle window resize events
  function handleResize() {
    // Apply or reset styles based on window width
    if (window.innerWidth <= 600) {
      updateSlideStyles();
    } else {
      // If screen is larger than 600px, remove inline styles from non-popup slides
      const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slick-slide');
      slides.forEach(slide => {
        if (!slide.closest('.popup-slider')) {
          slide.style.transform = '';
          slide.style.filter = '';
        }
      });
    }
  }

  // Listen for resize events
  window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);

  // Initial check and apply styles if on mobile
  if (window.innerWidth <= 600) {
    updateSlideStyles();
  }

  // Set up a MutationObserver to monitor changes to 'slick-current' class
  const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
      if (mutation.attributeName === 'class' && window.innerWidth <= 600) {
        updateSlideStyles();
      }
    });
  });

  // Options for the observer (which attributes to watch)
  const config = { attributes: true, childList: false, characterData: false };

  // Track all .slick-slide elements for class changes
  document.querySelectorAll('.slick-slide').forEach(slide => {
    // Ensure we're not observing slides in the popup-slider
    if (!slide.closest('.popup-slider')) {
      observer.observe(slide, config);
    }
  });
});
</script>

settings.title: Lottie Background

settings.html_area:
<script> 

// Redirect ALL /collections pages (including /collections/ index) to homepage,
// except handles explicitly allowed in `allowlist`.
(function () {
  try {
    var HOME_URL = '/';

    // If you want some collections to remain accessible, add them here:
    var allowlist = {
      // 'featured': 1,
      // 'new-arrivals': 1
    };

    var url = new URL(window.location.href);
    var qp = url.searchParams;

    // Skip common preview/editor modes (remove these lines if you want hard redirect always)
    if (qp.has('preview_theme_id') || qp.get('view') === 'editor') return;

    // Normalize path (trim trailing slashes)
    var path = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, '');

    // 1) Block the collections index ("/collections" or "/collections/")
    if (path === '/collections') {
      window.location.replace(HOME_URL);
      return;
    }

    // 2) Block individual collection pages unless allowlisted
    //    Match "/collections/<handle>" (handle = first segment after /collections)
    var m = url.pathname.match(/^\/collections\/([^\/?#]+)/i);
    if (!m) return; // not a collections page with a handle

    var handle = decodeURIComponent(m[1]).toLowerCase();

    // If not explicitly allowed, redirect
    if (!allowlist[handle]) {
      window.location.replace(HOME_URL);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn('Collection redirect error:', e);
  }
})();

</script>

<script>
(function() {
    var css = "@media screen and (max-width: 769px) { .cart-link__bubble--visible { background-color: #f00 !important; border-color: #730000 !important; } }",
        head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0],
        style = document.createElement('style');

    style.type = 'text/css';
    if (style.styleSheet){
        // This is required for IE8 and below.
        style.styleSheet.cssText = css;
    } else {
        style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));
    }

    head.appendChild(style);
})();



</script>

settings.title: styles
settings.html_area:
<script>
(function () {
  const WRAP_SELECTOR = '.gift-card-options';
  const BTN_SELECTOR = 'button.gift-card-btn.main-service-btn.booking-type-btn';
  const TARGET_CLASS = 'is-bogo-deals';
  const TARGET_TEXT = 'bogo deals';

  function normalize(str) {
    return (str || '')
      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase();
  }

  function findTitleText(btn) {
    // Try to grab the bold title div first (more precise)
    const titleDiv = btn.querySelector('div[style*="font-weight"]');
    const title = titleDiv ? titleDiv.textContent : btn.textContent;
    return normalize(title);
  }

  function tagButtons(root) {
    const wrap = root.matches && root.matches(WRAP_SELECTOR) ? root : root.querySelector && root.querySelector(WRAP_SELECTOR);
    if (!wrap) return;

    const buttons = wrap.querySelectorAll(BTN_SELECTOR);
    buttons.forEach((btn) => {
      const title = findTitleText(btn);
      const isBogo = title.includes(TARGET_TEXT);
      btn.classList.toggle(TARGET_CLASS, isBogo);
    });
  }

  function init() {
    // Initial pass
    tagButtons(document);

    // Observe body for any changes that might re-render the buttons
    const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
      let shouldRetag = false;

      for (const m of mutations) {
        // If gift-card-options itself changed, or nodes were added/removed, retag
        if (m.type === 'childList') {
          shouldRetag = true;
          break;
        }
        if (m.type === 'attributes' && (m.target && (m.target.matches?.(WRAP_SELECTOR) || m.target.closest?.(WRAP_SELECTOR)))) {
          shouldRetag = true;
          break;
        }
      }

      if (shouldRetag) tagButtons(document);
    });

    observer.observe(document.body, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true,
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: ['class', 'style']
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init, { once: true });
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>

<style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    var iframeContainer = document.getElementById("bon-iframe-container");

    // Create the overlay
    var overlay = document.createElement("div");
    overlay.id = "background-overlay";
    overlay.style.position = "fixed";
    overlay.style.top = 0;
    overlay.style.left = 0;
    overlay.style.width = "100%";
    overlay.style.height = "100%";
    overlay.style.backgroundColor = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)";
    overlay.style.zIndex = 999;
    overlay.style.display = "none";

    document.body.appendChild(overlay);

    // Function to check and toggle the overlay
    function checkAndToggleOverlay() {
        if (iframeContainer.classList.contains("bon-btn-hidden")) {
            overlay.style.display = "block";
        } else if (iframeContainer.classList.contains("bon-btn-display")) {
            overlay.style.display = "none";
        }
    }

    // Initial check
    checkAndToggleOverlay();

    // Monitor changes to the class attribute
    var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
        mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
            if (mutation.attributeName === "class") {
                checkAndToggleOverlay();
            }
        });
    });

    observer.observe(iframeContainer, { attributes: true });
});


</script>

settings.title: calendar promtion 1
settings.html_area:
<script>
/* Add-to-Calendar (ONE EVENT) — March 13 & 14 Event
   - Click any <a href="#add-sideshow-march">
   - Opens ONE Google Calendar event
   - Downloads ONE .ics file
   - Event spans March 13 (10am) through March 14 (8pm)
   - Time zone: America/Denver (Murray, UT)
*/
(function () {
  const CUSTOM_HASH = "#add-sideshow-march";
  const TZ = "America/Denver";
  const LOCATION = "Sideshow Productions Tattoo, 4973 S State St, Murray, UT 84107";

  const pad2 = (n) => String(n).padStart(2, "0");

  function fmtLocalCal(d) {
    return (
      d.getFullYear() +
      pad2(d.getMonth() + 1) +
      pad2(d.getDate()) +
      "T" +
      pad2(d.getHours()) +
      pad2(d.getMinutes()) +
      pad2(d.getSeconds())
    );
  }

  function ymdHis(d) {
    return (
      d.getFullYear() +
      pad2(d.getMonth() + 1) +
      pad2(d.getDate()) +
      "T" +
      pad2(d.getHours()) +
      pad2(d.getMinutes()) +
      pad2(d.getSeconds())
    );
  }

  function downloadICS(filename, content) {
    try {
      const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "text/calendar;charset=utf-8" });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.download = filename;
      a.href = url;
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      a.remove();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn("[AddToCal] ICS download failed:", err);
    }
  }

  // ---------- Date Logic ----------
  function nextMarch13(from = new Date()) {
    const today = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth(), from.getDate());
    let y = from.getFullYear();
    let d = new Date(y, 2, 13); // March = 2
    if (d < today) {
      y += 1;
      d = new Date(y, 2, 13);
    }
    return y;
  }

  const YEAR = nextMarch13();

  const evtStart = new Date(YEAR, 2, 13, 10, 0, 0);
  const evtEnd   = new Date(YEAR, 2, 14, 20, 0, 0);

  // ---------- Event Content ----------
  const TITLE = "Friday the 13th Flash Event • March 13–14";

  const DETAILS_TEXT = [
    "Sideshow Productions Tattoo",
    "",
    "FRIDAY (March 13)",
    "Time: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM",
    "• Flash tattoos starting at $20 ($13 + $7 gratuity)",
    "• Any 1 single color included",
    "• 2+ colors +$10 per color",
    "• Placement other than arms or legs +$10",
    "",
    "SATURDAY (March 14)",
    "Time: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM",
    "• $31 single piercings (excludes dermals, surface, tongue, cheek, genital)",
    "• March 14 ONLY: Buy One Get One FREE dermal & genital piercings",
    "",
    "WALK-IN EVENT",
    "First 13 people tattooed receive a gift certificate toward a future tattoo.",
    "",
    "Phone: (801) 301-5537",
    "Address: 4973 S State Street, Murray, UT 84107"
  ].join("\n");

  function openGoogleCalSingleEvent() {
    const url =
      "https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE" +
      "&text=" + encodeURIComponent(TITLE) +
      "&dates=" + encodeURIComponent(fmtLocalCal(evtStart) + "/" + fmtLocalCal(evtEnd)) +
      "&details=" + encodeURIComponent(DETAILS_TEXT) +
      "&location=" + encodeURIComponent(LOCATION) +
      "&ctz=" + encodeURIComponent(TZ);

    window.open(url, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer");
    return url;
  }

  function makeICSOneEvent() {
    const dtStamp = ymdHis(new Date());
    const safeDesc = DETAILS_TEXT.replace(/\r?\n/g, "\\n");

    const lines = [
      "BEGIN:VCALENDAR",
      "VERSION:2.0",
      "PRODID:-//Digital Vision Studios//AddToCal//EN",
      "CALSCALE:GREGORIAN",
      "METHOD:PUBLISH",
      "BEGIN:VEVENT",
      "UID:sideshow-march-" + YEAR + "@sideshowproductionstattoo",
      "DTSTAMP:" + dtStamp + "Z",
      "SUMMARY:" + TITLE,
      "DESCRIPTION:" + safeDesc,
      "LOCATION:" + LOCATION,
      "DTSTART;TZID=" + TZ + ":" + ymdHis(evtStart),
      "DTEND;TZID=" + TZ + ":" + ymdHis(evtEnd),
      "END:VEVENT",
      "END:VCALENDAR"
    ];

    return lines.join("\r\n");
  }

  function wire() {
    const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href="' + CUSTOM_HASH + '"]'));
    if (!links.length) return;

    links.forEach((a) => {
      a.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const url = openGoogleCalSingleEvent();
        downloadICS("Sideshow_March_Event_" + YEAR + ".ics", makeICSOneEvent());
      });
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", wire);
  } else {
    wire();
  }

})();
</script>

settings.title: calendar promotion 2
settings.html_area:
<script>
/* Add-to-Calendar for BOTH flyers (Sideshow • Feb 13 + Feb 14)
   - Click <a href="#add-friday-13th"> or <a href="#add-bloody-valentine">
   - Opens a Google Calendar tab AND downloads an .ics file
   - Feb 13: finds the NEXT year where Feb 13 is a Friday (matches “Friday the 13th” flyer)
   - Feb 14: uses the NEXT upcoming Feb 14 (stays current year-to-year)
   - Time zone: America/Denver (Murray, UT)
*/
(function () {
  const TZ = "America/Denver";
  const LOCATION = "Sideshow Productions Tattoo, 4973 S State St, Murray, UT 84107";

  // ---------- Helpers ----------
  const pad2 = (n) => String(n).padStart(2, "0");

  function fmtLocalCal(d) {
    return (
      d.getFullYear() +
      pad2(d.getMonth() + 1) +
      pad2(d.getDate()) +
      "T" +
      pad2(d.getHours()) +
      pad2(d.getMinutes()) +
      pad2(d.getSeconds())
    );
  }

  function ymdHis(d) {
    return (
      d.getFullYear() +
      pad2(d.getMonth() + 1) +
      pad2(d.getDate()) +
      "T" +
      pad2(d.getHours()) +
      pad2(d.getMinutes()) +
      pad2(d.getSeconds())
    );
  }

  function downloadICS(filename, content) {
    try {
      const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "text/calendar;charset=utf-8" });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.download = filename;
      a.href = url;
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      a.remove();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn("[AddToCal] ICS download failed:", err);
    }
  }

  function makeICS({ uid, title, detailsText, start, end }) {
    const dtStamp = ymdHis(new Date());
    const desc = (detailsText || "").replace(/\n/g, "\\n");

    const lines = [
      "BEGIN:VCALENDAR",
      "VERSION:2.0",
      "PRODID:-//Digital Vision Studios//AddToCal//EN",
      "CALSCALE:GREGORIAN",
      "METHOD:PUBLISH",
      "BEGIN:VEVENT",
      "UID:" + uid,
      "DTSTAMP:" + dtStamp + "Z",
      "SUMMARY:" + title,
      "DESCRIPTION:" + desc,
      "LOCATION:" + LOCATION,
      "DTSTART;TZID=" + TZ + ":" + ymdHis(start),
      "DTEND;TZID=" + TZ + ":" + ymdHis(end),
      "END:VEVENT",
      "END:VCALENDAR"
    ];
    return lines.join("\r\n");
  }

  function openGoogleCal({ title, detailsEncoded, start, end }) {
    const url =
      "https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE" +
      "&text=" + encodeURIComponent(title) +
      "&dates=" + encodeURIComponent(fmtLocalCal(start) + "/" + fmtLocalCal(end)) +
      "&details=" + (detailsEncoded || "") +
      "&location=" + encodeURIComponent(LOCATION) +
      "&ctz=" + encodeURIComponent(TZ);

    window.open(url, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer");
    return url;
  }

  // ---------- Date logic ----------
  // Next year where Feb 13 is a Friday
  function nextFeb13Friday(from = new Date()) {
    const today = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth(), from.getDate());
    for (let y = from.getFullYear(); y < from.getFullYear() + 30; y++) {
      const d = new Date(y, 1, 13); // Feb = 1
      const isFriday = d.getDay() === 5;
      const inFuture = d >= today;
      if (isFriday && inFuture) return y;
    }
    return from.getFullYear();
  }

  // Next upcoming Feb 14
  function nextFeb14(from = new Date()) {
    const today = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth(), from.getDate());
    let y = from.getFullYear();
    let d = new Date(y, 1, 14);
    if (d < today) {
      y += 1;
      d = new Date(y, 1, 14);
    }
    return y;
  }

  // ---------- Event definitions ----------
  const friday13Year = nextFeb13Friday();
  const friday13Start = new Date(friday13Year, 1, 13, 10, 0, 0);
  const friday13End   = new Date(friday13Year, 1, 13, 20, 0, 0);

  const valentinesYear = nextFeb14();
  const valentinesStart = new Date(valentinesYear, 1, 14, 12, 0, 0);
  const valentinesEnd   = new Date(valentinesYear, 1, 14, 20, 0, 0);

  const EVENTS = {
    "#add-friday-13th": {
      title: "Friday the 13th • Flash Tattoos + Specials",
      filename: "Sideshow_FridayThe13th_" + friday13Year + ".ics",
      uid: "sideshow-friday13-" + friday13Year + "@sideshowproductionstattoo",
      start: friday13Start,
      end: friday13End,
      detailsLines: [
        "Friday the 13th event at Sideshow Productions Tattoo",
        "",
        "DATE: February 13th",
        "TIME: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM",
        "",
        "Flash tattoos starting @ $20 ($13 + $7 gratuity).",
        "• Placement other than arms or legs is an additional $10.",
        "• Black only. Additional color is $10 per color.",
        "",
        "FIRST 13 PEOPLE TO GET TATTOED get a gift certificate toward a future tattoo.",
        "",
        "Specials:",
        "• All single piercings 13% off",
        "• All teeth whitening + tooth gems 13% off",
        "",
        "FIRST COME, FIRST SERVED • WALK-INS WELCOME",
        "",
        "Phone: (801) 301-5537 • IG: @sideshowproductionstattoo"
      ]
    },

    "#add-bloody-valentine": {
      title: "Bloody Valentine Promotion • Walk-in Event Only",
      filename: "Sideshow_BloodyValentine_" + valentinesYear + ".ics",
      uid: "sideshow-bloodyvalentine-" + valentinesYear + "@sideshowproductionstattoo",
      start: valentinesStart,
      end: valentinesEnd,
      detailsLines: [
        "Sideshow Productions Tattoo presents our annual Bloody Valentine Promotion!",
        "",
        "DATE: February 14th",
        "TIME: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM",
        "",
        "Flash tattoos starting @ $35",
        "• Neck and above is an additional $10",
        "• Black or red only",
        "• Additional colors are an additional $10 per color",
        "",
        "BOGO FREE piercings and dermals",
        "• Excludes genital and tongues",
        "",
        "BOGO FREE teeth whitening & tooth gems",
        "• All gems included",
        "",
        "WALK-IN EVENT ONLY",
        "",
        "Phone: (801) 301-5537 • IG: @sideshowproductionstattoo"
      ]
    }
  };

  // Pre-encode details for Google Calendar
  Object.keys(EVENTS).forEach((hash) => {
    const e = EVENTS[hash];
    e.detailsText = (e.detailsLines || []).join("\n");
    e.detailsEncoded = encodeURIComponent(e.detailsText);
  });

  // ---------- Wiring ----------
  function wire() {
    const hashes = Object.keys(EVENTS);

    let foundAny = false;

    hashes.forEach((hash) => {
      const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href="' + hash + '"]'));
      if (!anchors.length) return;

      foundAny = true;

      anchors.forEach((a) => {
        a.addEventListener(
          "click",
          function (ev) {
            ev.preventDefault();

            const e = EVENTS[hash];

            // Google Calendar tab
            const url = openGoogleCal({
              title: e.title,
              detailsEncoded: e.detailsEncoded,
              start: e.start,
              end: e.end
            });

            // ICS download
            const ics = makeICS({
              uid: e.uid,
              title: e.title,
              detailsText: e.detailsText,
              start: e.start,
              end: e.end
            });
            downloadICS(e.filename, ics);

            console.log("[AddToCal] Fired:", { hash, url, start: e.start, end: e.end });
          },
          { passive: false }
        );
      });
    });

    if (!foundAny) {
      console.warn("[AddToCal] No matching anchors found. Looking for:", Object.keys(EVENTS));
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", wire);
  } else {
    wire();
  }

  // Sanity log
  console.log("[AddToCal BOTH] Ready:", {
    tz: TZ,
    friday13: { year: friday13Year, start: friday13Start.toString(), end: friday13End.toString() },
    bloodyValentine: { year: valentinesYear, start: valentinesStart.toString(), end: valentinesEnd.toString() }
  });
})();
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    // Function to check if the URL contains a specific parameter
    function hasUrlParameter(name) {
        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        return urlParams.has(name);
    }

    // Check if the URL contains the "call" parameter
    if (hasUrlParameter('call')) {
        // Create an invisible button
        const callButton = document.createElement('a');
        callButton.href = 'tel:(385) 547-9547';
        callButton.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.appendChild(callButton);

        // Simulate a click on the button to prompt the call
        setTimeout(() => callButton.click(), 100); // Slight delay to ensure the element is fully appended
    }
});

</script>


<script>
    document.getElementById('apply-discount').addEventListener('click', function() {
      console.log('Apply discount button clicked.');

      var discountCode = document.getElementById('cart-discount').value;
      var feedbackElement = document.getElementById('discount-feedback');

      console.log('Applying discount code:', discountCode);

      // Send discount code to Shopify
      fetch('/discount/' + discountCode, {
        method: 'GET'
      }).then(response => {
        console.log('Discount response status:', response.status);

        if (response.ok) {
          console.log('Discount code applied successfully.');
          
          // Refresh cart to update the prices
          fetch('/cart.js')
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(cart => {
              console.log('Cart data:', cart);

              // Update cart total price on the page
              document.querySelector('[data-cart-total] .money').textContent = Shopify.formatMoney(cart.total_price, "{{ shop.money_format }}");
              feedbackElement.textContent = 'Discount applied successfully!';
              feedbackElement.style.color = 'green';
              feedbackElement.style.display = 'block';
            }).catch(error => {
              console.error('Error fetching cart data:', error);
            });
        } else {
          console.log('Invalid discount code.');
          feedbackElement.textContent = 'Invalid discount code';
          feedbackElement.style.color = 'red';
          feedbackElement.style.display = 'block';
        }
      }).catch(error => {
        console.error('Error applying discount code:', error);
        feedbackElement.textContent = 'An error occurred. Please try again.';
        feedbackElement.style.color = 'red';
        feedbackElement.style.display = 'block';
      });
    });
  </script>

<script>
/**
 * Gift Card Protection Script
 * Prevents bypassing the gift card counter by:
 * 1. Redirecting users who directly access gift card product pages
 * 2. Redirecting users who access the cart page with gift cards
 * 3. Disabling product links in the AJAX cart for gift cards
 */

(function() {
  'use strict';

  // Configuration
  const CONFIG = {
    // Keywords to identify gift card products (case-insensitive)
    giftCardKeywords: [
      'gift-card',
      'gift card',
      'giftcard',
      'gc-'
    ],
    
    // URL patterns to check
    patterns: {
      product: /\/products\//,
      cart: /\/cart/,
      collections: /\/collections\//
    },
    
    // Where to redirect users who try to bypass
    redirectUrl: '/',
    
    // Selectors for AJAX cart
    ajaxCartSelectors: {
      container: '#CartContainer',
      productLinks: '.cart__row a[href*="/products/"], .ajaxcart_row a[href*="/products/"]',
      productRows: '.cart__row, .ajaxcart_row'
    }
  };

  /**
   * Check if a URL or handle contains gift card keywords
   */
  function isGiftCardProduct(urlOrHandle) {
    if (!urlOrHandle) return false;
    const lowerStr = urlOrHandle.toLowerCase();
    return CONFIG.giftCardKeywords.some(keyword => lowerStr.includes(keyword));
  }

  /**
   * Check if current page is a gift card product page and redirect if needed
   */
  function checkProductPage() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;
    
    // Check if we're on a product page
    if (CONFIG.patterns.product.test(currentPath)) {
      // Extract product handle from URL
      const productHandle = currentPath.split('/products/')[1]?.split('?')[0]?.split('#')[0];
      
      if (isGiftCardProduct(productHandle)) {
        console.log('Gift card product page detected, redirecting to home...');
        window.location.href = CONFIG.redirectUrl;
        return true;
      }
    }
    
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * Check if cart page has gift cards and redirect if needed
   */
  function checkCartPage() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;
    
    // Only check if we're on the cart page (not AJAX cart)
    if (currentPath === '/cart' || currentPath === '/cart/') {
      // Fetch cart to check for gift cards
      fetch('/cart.js')
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(cart => {
          const hasGiftCards = cart.items.some(item => 
            isGiftCardProduct(item.handle) || 
            isGiftCardProduct(item.product_title) ||
            isGiftCardProduct(item.url)
          );
          
          if (hasGiftCards) {
            console.log('Gift cards detected in cart, redirecting to home...');
            window.location.href = CONFIG.redirectUrl;
          }
        })
        .catch(error => {
          console.error('Error checking cart:', error);
        });
      
      return true;
    }
    
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * Disable gift card product links in AJAX cart
   */
  function disableAjaxCartLinks() {
    const ajaxCart = document.querySelector(CONFIG.ajaxCartSelectors.container);
    if (!ajaxCart) return;

    // Find all product rows
    const productRows = ajaxCart.querySelectorAll(CONFIG.ajaxCartSelectors.productRows);
    
    productRows.forEach(row => {
      const productHandle = row.getAttribute('data-product-handle');
      
      // Check if this is a gift card product
      if (isGiftCardProduct(productHandle)) {
        // Find all product links in this row
        const links = row.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/products/"]');
        
        links.forEach(link => {
          // Prevent default click behavior
          link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            console.log('Gift card link click prevented');
            return false;
          });
          
          // Add visual indicator that link is disabled
          link.style.cursor = 'default';
          link.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
          link.style.opacity = '0.7';
          
          // Optional: Add a data attribute to mark as protected
          link.setAttribute('data-gc-protected', 'true');
        });
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * Set up mutation observer to watch for AJAX cart updates
   */
  function watchAjaxCart() {
    // Disable links on initial load
    disableAjaxCartLinks();
    
    // Watch for cart updates
    const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
      mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        if (mutation.addedNodes.length || mutation.type === 'childList') {
          // Re-disable links when cart content changes
          disableAjaxCartLinks();
        }
      });
    });
    
    // Observe the cart container
    const ajaxCart = document.querySelector(CONFIG.ajaxCartSelectors.container);
    if (ajaxCart) {
      observer.observe(ajaxCart, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true
      });
    }
    
    // Also watch for the cart container to be added (in case it loads later)
    const bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
      const ajaxCart = document.querySelector(CONFIG.ajaxCartSelectors.container);
      if (ajaxCart) {
        bodyObserver.disconnect();
        disableAjaxCartLinks();
        observer.observe(ajaxCart, {
          childList: true,
          subtree: true
        });
      }
    });
    
    bodyObserver.observe(document.body, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true
    });
  }

  /**
   * Listen for AJAX cart events (if theme uses custom events)
   */
  function setupCartEventListeners() {
    // Common Shopify AJAX cart events
    const cartEvents = [
      'cart:updated',
      'cart.updated',
      'ajaxCart.afterCartLoad',
      'drawer:opened',
      'modal:opened'
    ];
    
    cartEvents.forEach(eventName => {
      document.addEventListener(eventName, function() {
        setTimeout(disableAjaxCartLinks, 100);
      });
    });
    
    // Watch for any fetch requests to cart.js
    if (window.fetch) {
      const originalFetch = window.fetch;
      window.fetch = function(...args) {
        return originalFetch.apply(this, args).then(response => {
          // If it's a cart request, disable links after a short delay
          if (args[0] && (args[0].includes('/cart') || args[0].includes('cart.js'))) {
            setTimeout(disableAjaxCartLinks, 200);
          }
          return response;
        });
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * Initialize protection
   */
  function init() {
    console.log('Gift Card Protection initialized');
    
    // Check current page
    const redirectedFromProduct = checkProductPage();
    const redirectedFromCart = checkCartPage();
    
    // If we didn't redirect, set up AJAX cart protection
    if (!redirectedFromProduct && !redirectedFromCart) {
      // Wait for DOM to be ready
      if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
          watchAjaxCart();
          setupCartEventListeners();
        });
      } else {
        watchAjaxCart();
        setupCartEventListeners();
      }
    }
  }

  // Start protection
  init();

})();

  </script>

custom_css: @keyframes slideIn {0% {transform: translateX(-100%); /* Start off-screen */ opacity: 0; } 100% {transform: translateX(0); /* End at final position */ opacity: 1; }}
.drawer {animation: slideIn 0.5s forwards; opacity: 0; /* Ensure it starts hidden */}
.drawer.js-drawer-open {/* This class ensures the drawer stays visible and in place after the animation */ transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1;}

.drawer {transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1), opacity 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1); transform: translateX(-100%); /* Adjust for initial off-screen position */ opacity: 0; /* Start with the drawer hidden */}
.drawer.js-drawer-open {transform: translateX(0); /* Slide in */ opacity: 1; /* Become fully visible */}
